postToolUse.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.php$'; then for cfg in phpstan.neon phpstan.neon.dist phpstan.dist.neon; do if [ -f "$cfg" ]; then php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress --error-format=raw "$file" 2>&1 | head -20; break; fi; done; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then for cfg in .eslintrc.js .eslintrc.cjs .eslintrc.json .eslintrc.yml eslint.config.js eslint.config.mjs eslint.config.ts; do if [ -f "$cfg" ]; then npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "$file" 2>&1 | head -20; break; fi; done; fi
